## Cycle-Spider PR Submission

**Description:**
Briefly describe the changes. If adding a new primitive, ensure it integrates with the `SpiderOrchestrator`.

**Checklist:**
- [ ] Code follows the zero-trust `SystemState` architecture.
- [ ] No `__init__.py` or `requirements.txt` files were introduced.
- [ ] Added tests for the new logic.
- [ ]
